% Smoke build for course-metadata.sty's arbitrary-key auto-vivification.
%
% Each custom key below must (a) be absorbed by the catch-all without erroring
% and (b) mint a working \Get<Key> getter.  Rendering all three markers proves
% both halves: a regressed catch-all (.unknown) errors under -halt-on-error, and
% a regressed getter derivation leaves \Get... undefined -> also a build error.
% Asserted by EXPECT_TEXT["Test/Metadata"] in smoke_test.py.
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{course-metadata}

% Loud branch: warnings ON -> the auto-create note is a \PackageWarning (.log,
% non-fatal). Must not halt the build.
\MetaWarnCustomKeys
\metasetup{lecture-hall = {Room 7 CMLECTHALLMARK}}

% Quiet branch: same machinery, warning downgraded to \PackageInfo.
\MetaAllowCustomKeys
\metasetup{ta-name = {Pat CMTANAMEMARK}}

\begin{document}
Office: \GetOfficeHours\par   % custom key from coursemeta
Hall:   \GetLectureHall\par   % inline custom key, loud branch
TA:     \GetTaName\par        % inline custom key, quiet branch
\end{document}
